title: Lane 5 — Replace Drizzle .get() with .limit(1).then() in 4 files
consumer_purpose: Postgres compatibility — .get() is SQLite-only; replace with .limit(1).then() for PGlite
content:
## Lane 5 Plan — Drizzle .get() → .limit(1).then()

### File 1: share-next.ts (lines 82, 237)
- Change `db()` wrapper from `Effect.sync(() => Database.use(fn))` to `Effect.promise(() => Database.use(fn) as Promise<T>)` to handle async thenable queries
- Replace `.get()` with `.limit(1).then(rows => rows[0])` at line 237

### File 2: sync/index.ts (line 86)  
- Replace `.get()),\n` with `.limit(1)),\n` inside the callback
- Chain `.then(rows => rows[0])` outside the Database.use() call
- The result is now a Promise; the calling code must handle it (this is expected for Postgres migration)

### File 3: data-migration.ts (line 134)
- Same pattern as sync/index.ts
- Replace `.get()),\n` with `.limit(1)),\n` inside the callback
- Chain `.then(rows => rows[0])` outside the Database.use() call

### File 4: worktree/index.ts (line 482)
- Replace `.get()),\n` with `.limit(1)),\n` inside the Database.use() callback
- Chain `.then(rows => rows[0])` outside Database.use() but inside Effect.sync
- Change `Effect.sync()` to `Effect.promise()` to handle the async result

### Verification
- Run `bun typecheck` from packages/opencode
- Check exit_code === 0
